title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google DeepMind demonstrated Science Skills, an agentic workbench that gives researchers fluency in scientific tools, models, and databases. The demo showed how to move from a genetic variant observation to wet-lab experimental design in minutes by orchestrating frontier models and accessing integrated insights from over 30 scientific databases including UniProt, PubChem, and ChEMBL.
